summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Iteration 55 features: CvAnalysisSection compact mode in Trajectoire tab. All tests passed. Compact mode correctly shows ONLY the upload button in Trajectoire tab (no audit, no centres d'intérêt, no CV generation section). Full mode in Compétences tab shows complete CV analysis UI. Timeline displays correctly with year markers and step cards with visibility toggles.
critical_code_review_comments: CvAnalysisSection compact prop correctly implemented at line 24 with default value false
Compact mode rendering (lines 286-380) shows: upload button when idle, progress bar when uploading, success with trajectory notice when done, error with retry when failed
Full mode rendering (lines 382-1006) shows complete UI with drop zone, audit, centres d'intérêt, CV models generation
ParticulierView.jsx correctly passes compact prop to CvAnalysisSection in Trajectoire tab (lines 1027, 1043)
Empty state (cv-entry-section) shows upload icon + 'Commencez par charger votre CV' title + compact button
Update state (cv-update-section) shows 'Mettre à jour mon CV' + compact button when user has steps
seed_data_creation: Used existing bob23 user with 5 trajectory steps and testboost user with 0 steps.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 55 compact mode feature fully tested. Key findings: 1) Trajectoire tab (bob23 with steps): cv-compact-section found, cv-compact-upload-btn shows 'Charger mon CV', cv-update-section shows 'Mettre à jour mon CV', NO audit/centres-interet/cv-models sections (correct compact behavior), timeline-container with 5 steps and 4 year separators. 2) Trajectoire tab (testboost no steps): cv-entry-section shows empty state with upload icon and 'Commencez par charger votre CV', cv-compact-section and cv-compact-upload-btn found, NO timeline-container (correct for 0 steps). 3) Compétences tab: Full CvAnalysisSection with cv-section, cv-upload-input drop zone, dclic-boost-section (bob23) or dclic-boost-invite (testboost), skills-section. 4) All 4 tabs (Trajectoire, Compétences, Documents, Matching) navigable and functional.

trajectoire_tab_bob23: NO cv-audit-section in Trajectoire tab (correct compact mode) ✓
Timeline steps: BTS Banque (Formation 2017), Conseiller clientèle (Emploi 2019), Transition professionnelle (Recherche emploi 2022) ✓
trajectoire_tab_testboost: 'Commencez par charger votre CV' message displayed ✓
competences_tab_bob23: 4 D'CLIC dimensions displayed: MBTI=ENFJ, DISC=Influence, RIASEC=Social, Vertu=Empathie ✓
